headline: Estee Lauder surges on earnings beat and raised guidance
summary: Investing.com -- The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) reported third-quarter results that exceeded analyst expectations, with the company also raising its full-year outlook, sending shares up 13.7% premarket.

content.title: Estee Lauder surges on earnings beat and raised guidance
content.summary: Investing.com -- The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) reported third-quarter results that exceeded analyst expectations, with the company also raising its full-year outlook, sending shares up 13.7% premarket.

headline: Estée Lauder Stock Jumps as Q3 Profits Top Estimates
summary: The company is also laying off additional employees and signaled confidence in 2027, although there was no word on the potential Puig deal.

content.title: Estée Lauder Stock Jumps as Q3 Profits Top Estimates
content.summary: The company is also laying off additional employees and signaled confidence in 2027, although there was no word on the potential Puig deal.

headline: Estée Lauder (NYSE:EL) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates, Stock Jumps 11.5%
summary: Beauty products company Estée Lauder (NYSE:EL) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.6% year on year to $3.71 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.88 per share was 35.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Estée Lauder (NYSE:EL) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates, Stock Jumps 11.5%
content.summary: Beauty products company Estée Lauder (NYSE:EL) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.6% year on year to $3.71 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.88 per share was 35.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Apple leads Wall Street toward more records as oil prices pull back
summary: The U.S. stock market is rising toward more records Friday after Apple, Estee Lauder and others joined the list of companies delivering fatter profits for the start of the year than analysts expected.  Easing oil prices are also helping to steady the stock markets around the world that are still open on the May Day holiday.  Apple led the way and rallied 4% after the iPhone seller reported stronger profit and revenue for the latest quarter than analysts expected.

content.title: Apple leads Wall Street toward more records as oil prices pull back
content.summary: The U.S. stock market is rising toward more records Friday after Apple, Estee Lauder and others joined the list of companies delivering fatter profits for the start of the year than analysts expected.  Easing oil prices are also helping to steady the stock markets around the world that are still open on the May Day holiday.  Apple led the way and rallied 4% after the iPhone seller reported stronger profit and revenue for the latest quarter than analysts expected.

headline: Reddit Q1 revenue jumps 69%, Estée Lauder plans to cut 3,000 more jobs
summary: Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Reddit (RDDT) reporting a 69% jump in its first quarter revenue, Estée Lauder (EL) raising its annual profit forecast while planning to cut up to an additional 3,000 jobs from its global workforce, and the latest earnings results from consumer brands Colgate-Palmolive (CL) and Clorox (CLX).
